candidates.why: This is the main top-line revenue measure including operating income; only explicit revenue candidate provided.
This is clearly a cost of materials consumed in production, matching COGS concept on the income statement.
This is an inventory component on the balance sheet, not a flow expense, so not appropriate for COGS.
This is revenue, not an operating expense; should not be used as SG&A.
Best single overhead bucket for SG&A-type costs when detailed SG&A is not separately labeled; appears as main operating expense line excluding COGS.
This is other operating income, not overhead expense; should not be included in SG&A components.
This is an overhead-type operating expense and can be considered part of SG&A components.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization is a non-cash D&A item, which is explicitly excluded from SG&A per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected main operating expense bucket plus specific miscellaneous operating expense as SG&A components, excluding revenue, income items, and amortization per rules.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line on income statement; matches XRD definition.
This is an asset, not a period R&D expense.
Capitalized development costs, not the current-period expense.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized development costs; not the R&D expense flow line.
Net interest is less preferred than a pure interest expense line when that exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Good representation of interest expense but a more basic 'Interest expense' line is also available and populated.
Lease interest component only; too narrow for total interest expense.
Primary gross interest expense line on income statement with consistent negative values; best match for XINT.
Appears similar to interest expense but slightly different values; could be an alternative presentation but less clear than the explicit 'Interest expense' row.
Capitalized portion of interest, not total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities only; subset of total interest expense.
Interest component related to pensions only; subset of total interest expense.
Capitalized interest, not total interest expense.
Represents minority interest in profit, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not interest expense.
Supplemental heading without visible data; main populated interest expense is under 'Interest expense'.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail for lease interest; subset of total interest expense.
Balance sheet derivative asset; not an interest expense.
Balance sheet item, not P&L interest expense.
Interest-earning assets, not expense line.
Debt balance, not expense.
Long-term debt balance, not expense.
Equity attributable to minorities, not interest expense.
Same as above; not interest expense.
Not clearly defined here; likely related to debt disclosures but less precise than explicit P&L interest expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Carried against equity in associates and joint ventures
candidates.why: OCI component related to associates, not total book equity.
Refers to equity-accounted investments, not total shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Asset for equity method investments, not equity capital.
Component of equity but not total book equity.
Retained earnings portion of equity, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Items charged to equity in associates and JV
candidates.why: Component within equity; not total.
Subcomponent of equity; not total on its own.
Represents total equity attributable to owners of the parent, which is the correct book equity measure for common shareholders.
Appears to be total equity including non-controlling interests (since it exceeds 'Total equity'); less precise for book equity to common.

variables.notes: Chose 'Total equity' as book equity attributable to owners, excluding non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to non-controlling interests on the income statement; reflects minority interest portion of earnings, not the balance sheet stock but valid as an MIB measure.
Duplicate label to non-controlling interests; same concept.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation to minorities; flow measure, not the equity balance.
Equity attributable to non-controlling interests on the balance sheet; primary measure of minority interest (MIB).
Duplicate of 'Non-controlling interests' showing same values; also represents minority equity.
